brand.name: origam
brand.tagline: The Vue 3 design system that just works.

footer.tagline: The Vue 3 design system that just works.

meta.title: Why origam? · Vue 3 design system
meta.description: An honest look at what origam is, what makes it different, and when you should — or shouldn't — choose it.

hero.subtitle: We built origam for Vue 3 teams who care about design quality, accessibility, and token-driven consistency. Here's what we do well — and where we're still growing.

strengths.title: Built for Vue 3. From the ground up.
strengths.subtitle: Every API, every composable, every prop — designed for Composition API and TypeScript from day one.

vue3.title: Vue 3 native
vue3.description: Built with Composition API and <script setup>. No legacy Options API shim, no Vue 2 baggage — just clean, idiomatic Vue 3.

tokens.title: Design tokens DTCG
tokens.description: Tokens Studio-compatible, Style Dictionary v4. 8 themes switch at runtime with zero remount and zero flicker.

charts.title: 95 components + 29 chart primitives
charts.description: From atomic buttons to line, area, donut, heatmap and candlestick charts — all in one coherent package.

a11y.title: WCAG 2.1 AA verified
a11y.description: axe-core + Playwright a11y tests ship with every component. Keyboard, screen-readers and reduced-motion: covered.

css.title: CSS-first architecture
css.description: Container queries, :has(), color-mix(), view-transition-name. We use the platform so your bundle doesn't pay for polyfills.

treeshake.title: < 50 kb tree-shakable
treeshake.description: ESM-first build. Import what you use; the rest never reaches your users.

composables.title: Headless composables
composables.description: Every component exposes its logic as a standalone composable. Use our UI or build your own on top of our primitives.

mit.title: MIT licensed
mit.description: No license fees, no usage restrictions. origam is and will remain open source.

comparison.title: How does origam compare?
comparison.subtitle: A feature-by-feature look at the Vue ecosystem's main design systems. Assessments are our own and may be out of date — always verify against the project's current docs.
comparison.disclaimer: Some assessments reflect our interpretation of publicly available documentation. Competitors ship fast — check their docs.
comparison.vuetifyNote: Mature Material Design system, large community and ecosystem.
comparison.primeVueNote: Very large component count, has its own token system (PrimeFlex).
comparison.quasarNote: Full multi-platform framework (web, Cordova, Electron). Different scope.
comparison.elementPlusNote: Popular in the Chinese developer community, wide component coverage.
comparison.naiveUiNote: TypeScript-first, theme customisation via JS, lightweight.

weaknesses.title: Where we're still growing.
weaknesses.subtitle: origam is young. That's a strength in terms of API freshness — and a constraint in terms of maturity.

community.title: Smaller community
community.description: Vuetify and PrimeVue have years of production usage, thousands of Stack Overflow answers, and rich third-party template markets. origam doesn't — yet.

templates.title: Fewer ready-made templates
templates.description: You won't find dozens of admin dashboards or landing-page kits built on origam today. You build with the primitives.

scale.title: Less battle-tested at scale
scale.description: We haven't been stress-tested in apps with hundreds of devs and millions of daily users. If that's your situation, factor this in.

useCases.title: Pick origam when…
useCases.noFitsTitle: origam might not be the right call

greenfield.title: Greenfield Vue 3 project
greenfield.description: Starting fresh on Vue 3 with a design team that works in Figma and tokens? origam is built for this exact setup.

tokenTeam.title: Design-token-driven team
tokenTeam.description: If your designer uses Tokens Studio or Style Dictionary, origam integrates natively — no translation layer needed.

saasProduct.title: SaaS / product requiring multiple brand themes
saasProduct.description: Need to ship the same app in client-A colours and client-B colours? Multi-theme at runtime is a first-class feature.

dataviz.title: Data-heavy UI with charts
dataviz.description: 29 chart primitives — line, area, bar, donut, heatmap, candlestick — themed and accessible, in one install.

migration.title: Migrating a large Vuetify 2 codebase
migration.description: If you have thousands of Vuetify components to migrate, Vuetify 3 will be a lower-friction path than origam.

ecosystem.title: Needing a large third-party template market
ecosystem.description: If you rely on pre-built admin themes or marketplace templates, Vuetify or PrimeVue have a larger catalogue today.

cta.title: Ready to try it?
cta.description: Install origam in 30 seconds and see how far the defaults take you.

meta.title: Roadmap · origam design system
meta.description: Where origam is today, what has been delivered, and what is coming next. Public, honest, updated with each release.

hero.subtitle: origam is an early-stage Vue 3 design system. Here is where we stand today, what we have already shipped, and what is on the horizon.

status.subtitle: An honest snapshot of what works, what is in progress, and what is still missing.
status.npmPublished: First public release on npm — tarball 869 kB, 0 critical vulnerabilities
status.preDelivery: Pre-delivery automated via prepublishOnly (tokens + build + 220 unit tests)
status.readmeChangelog: README correct, CHANGELOG up to date
status.monorepo: Monorepo migration complete (May 2026) — 6 pnpm workspace packages
status.docOnline: No online documentation yet. No deployed stories.
status.ci: CI pipeline incomplete — lint / test / build / publish not yet automated
status.playwrightCoverage: Partial Playwright coverage (~100 specs for 161 stories)
status.bundleMonitoring: No bundle-size monitoring yet. No systematic a11y audit.
status.wave4Shipped: Wave 4 shipped — 13 components + gradient support + OrigamTextMask (v2.6.0)

delivered.subtitle: origam is not starting from zero — here is the scope already shipped on npm, with the latest waves below.

wave1.title: Wave 1 — New components
wave1.tabs: Tabs / Tab / TabPanel / TabPanels — 3 variants, 2 orientations, ARIA WAI-ARIA APG, lazy panel mount
wave1.commandPalette: CommandPalette (⌘K) — fuzzy match, useHotkey cross-platform, reuses OrigamKbd
wave1.snackbarStack: SnackbarStack — 8 locations, FIFO max stack, useSnackbarStack singleton, role=status/alert per intent
wave1.bracket: Bracket (tournament bracket) — 3 variants (single-elim, double-elim, round-robin), SVG connectors

wave2.title: Wave 2 — Enrichments
wave2.parallax: OrigamParallax — multi-layer, direction, easing, CSS-first scroll-driven animation
wave2.code: OrigamCode — Shiki syntax highlighting, 14 languages, 2 themes, line numbers, copy, filename
wave2.textareaRichtext: OrigamTextareaField — rich mode contenteditable editor with 9 toolbar commands
wave2.textFieldMask: OrigamTextField — mask engine with 13 built-in patterns + Luhn + IBAN mod-97

wave3.title: Wave 3 — Infrastructure
wave3.nuxtModule: Official Nuxt module (sub-export origam/nuxt) — auto-import, SSR-safe theme plugin
wave3.monorepo: pnpm monorepo — 6 packages (ds, marketing, stories, docs, tests, figma-plugin)

wave4.title: Wave 4 — New components & features
wave4.grid: OrigamGrid — declarative CSS Grid with columns, rows, areas, gap, auto-flow
wave4.masonry: OrigamMasonry — CSS-first via grid-template-rows: masonry, JS fallback
wave4.blockquote: OrigamBlockquote — typography: quote + author + source + variants
wave4.emptyState: OrigamEmptyState — 5 presets: no-data, no-results, error, offline, locked
wave4.clipboard: OrigamClipboard — copy wrapper + Copied! feedback, no dependencies
wave4.inlineEdit: OrigamInlineEdit — edit-in-place pattern, v-model + validators, ARIA live
wave4.numberFormat: OrigamNumberFormat — i18n formatting via Intl.NumberFormat, display only
wave4.qrCode: OrigamQRCode — SVG output, ISO/IEC 18004, error correction level, logo overlay
wave4.watermark: OrigamWatermark — diagonal repeat overlay, SVG text or canvas data-URI
wave4.video: OrigamVideo — custom player: play/pause, scrubber, PIP, captions, HLS optional
wave4.sound: OrigamSound — audio player + waveform via Web Audio API, Media Session API
wave4.calendar: OrigamCalendar — month/week/day/agenda views, RRULE, drag-to-create, 100 % in-house
wave4.chart: OrigamChart — SVG-native: line, area, bar, pie, radar, scatter — no d3 or chart.js
wave4.gradient: Gradient support — color/bgColor/textColor props accept gradient values
wave4.textMask: OrigamTextMask — text reveal via background-clip: text, gradient + image backgrounds

phases.title: A phased roadmap.
phases.subtitle: Each phase builds on the previous. The order reflects real technical dependencies, not arbitrary milestones.

ci.title: Complete CI / CD pipeline
ci.description: GitHub Actions: lint, token:lint, unit tests, e2e, build on every PR. Automated publish on tag v*.

deployment.title: Deploy VitePress + Histoire
deployment.description: Docs on origam.dev, stories on stories.origam.dev. Blocks all external adoption.

playwright.title: Full Playwright coverage
playwright.description: 100 % of public components covered — one spec per component exercising every Variant and prop.

a11yAudit.title: Overlay a11y audit
a11yAudit.description: Focus trap, focus restoration, aria-modal, Esc key for Dialog, Menu, Tooltip, Drawer, Snackbar.

bundleSize.title: Bundle-size monitoring
bundleSize.description: size-limit on every sub-export. PR comments auto-generated. The 5.6 MB → 869 kB drop must stay an asset.

v3.title: v3.0.0 — Strategy B
v3.description: Remove *Styles returns when the value is tokenised. Utility classes become the sole API. ~2× less reactive computation.

motionTokens.title: Motion & a11y media tokens
motionTokens.description: tokens/semantic/motion.json — durations, easings. Auto 0ms if prefers-reduced-motion. High-contrast ramp.

vrt.title: Visual regression testing
vrt.description: Playwright toHaveScreenshot() per Variant, or Chromatic / Lost-Pixel. Baseline on main, diff blocks PR.

accentColor.title: accentColor rename (breaking v3)
accentColor.description: bgColor → accentColor prop rename, aligned with the CSS accent-color standard. Full deprecation path included.

turborepo.title: Turborepo build cache
turborepo.description: Replace raw pnpm -r scripts with Turborepo pipelines. Remote cache drastically cuts CI rebuild time.

vapor.title: Vue Vapor mode (exploratory)
vapor.description: No-virtual-DOM compilation — ~40 % less runtime overhead. POC on 5 pivot components, benchmarks first.

webComponents.title: Web Components export
webComponents.description: origam/elements sub-export via defineCustomElement. Cross-framework demo (React, Svelte, Angular).

themeBuilder.title: Theme Builder UI
themeBuilder.description: Standalone app consuming origam itself: edit primitive tokens, preview components in real time, export brand JSON.

cta.title: Follow the progress.
cta.description: Star the repository on GitHub to stay updated. Contributions and feedback are welcome.

wave4Grid.subtitle: Everything in Wave 4 is live on npm. These are the components and features available right now in origam.

meta.title: origam · Vue 3 design system
meta.description: 95 components. 29 chart primitives. Full a11y. Design tokens out of the box. Built for Vue 3 with TypeScript-first DX.

hero.badge: v{version} — 29 charts shipped, WCAG 2.1 AA pass
hero.subtitle: 95 components. 29 chart primitives. Full a11y. Design tokens out of the box. Built for Vue 3 with TypeScript-first DX.

features.title: Everything you'd expect. Nothing you wouldn't.
features.subtitle: A complete toolkit for shipping Vue 3 apps — from atomic primitives to complex data viz, every piece tested, themed and a11y-compliant.

charts.title: 29 chart primitives
charts.description: Line, area, bar, donut, candlestick, heatmap — Highcharts-tier coverage without the license.

a11y.title: WCAG 2.1 AA verified
a11y.description: Each component ships with axe-core + Playwright a11y tests. Keyboard, screen-readers, motion: covered.

tokens.title: Design tokens
tokens.description: Multi-theme via Tokens Studio. Switch between light, dark, or your own brand at runtime with zero remount.

typescript.title: TypeScript first
typescript.description: Strict mode, full type inference, generics on Data Table/List. Your IDE will thank you.

css.title: CSS-first
css.description: Container queries, :has(), color-mix(), view-transition-name. We use modern CSS so you don't reinvent it.

composition.title: Composition API
composition.description: Built on script setup + Composition API. Headless composables exposed when you need to go low-level.

playground.title: Try before you ship.
playground.caption: The Vue 3 design system that just works. Try a component live.
playground.previewText: The Vue 3 design system that just works. Try a component live.

themes.subtitle: DTCG-compliant design tokens, multi-theme out of the box. Switch between light, dark or your custom brand at runtime — zero remount, zero flicker.

cta.title: Ready to ship faster?
cta.description: Spin up your Vue 3 project with origam in 30 seconds.
